svg.text: Composite assets with VFX and SFX managed via timeline
VFX Tools are composite assets consisting of visual effects (VFX) and sound effects (SFX) managed via a timeline.
Can be played or mounted the same way as regular special effects. Access: Combat Preset > VFX Tool > New VFX Tool.
Fixed duration. Auto-destroys when duration reached.
Triggered via [Play Timed Effects] node only.
Destroyed via Config ID or Instance ID in Node Graph.
Mounted via [Mount Looping Effects] node only.
Note: VFX Tool type must be chosen at creation time. It cannot be changed later.
Multiple tracks on timeline; click [New Track] to add
Determines whether effects in a track are visible to each player.
If any condition is not met, all effects in that track are hidden.
Hostile Faction, Allied Faction, Own Faction
Default: all selected (all players see effects)
Updates per client; True = visible, False = hidden
Placed on effect tracks; reference effect/sound assets
Life Cycle Settings for Effect Blocks
Effect plays until finished (Timed) or VFX Tool destroyed
Must configure Duration. Effect destroyed at duration end.
[Set to Asset Duration] sets duration to asset duration (may vary due to random playback).
- Stop and Clear Effects: instant removal
Disabled: effect continues until lifecycle completes
- Stop and Clear Effects: instant removal
(auto-hide, reappear when VFX Tool visible again)
Right-click track > Add Event > VFX Effect
Select any Regular Effect Asset (Timed Effect / Looping Effect)
When enabled, built-in default sound plays simultaneously
Only for some effects; modifies visual style to match Elemental Type
Playback speed multiplier (default 1). Does not affect default audio speed.
Offset (location), Rotation (rotation offset), Zoom (uniform scale only)
No surface within Ground Height = not shown
Linear Fill (neg Z) or Inside Out (X)
Clockwise: sweep from neg X-axis to angle
Restart from beginning after loop interval
Location offset relative to VFX Tool's origin
IX. How to Use VFX Tools
Same as regular effects; enter Config ID or search
Play Timed Effects Node Parameters (when asset is VFX Tool)
Select a VFX Tool by Config ID or search box
Owner entity of the VFX Tool
Origin placed at corresponding attachment point position
Zoom Ratio (combined with VFX Tool zoom)
Play Built-In Sound Effect: Yes = each effect uses its own setting. No = no default sounds play.
If Timed VFX Tool duration is reached, active loop segment effects are cut off at lifecycle end.
AI Generated, based on Craftspeople Academy. Version: Luna 7
